home.title: Because Learning Deserves a Real Chance
home.description: The first platform in Egypt that allows dental students to gain real-world practical experience, and provides patients with the opportunity to get 100% free treatment in a safe and trusted environment.
home.platformOffers: The platform offers everything you need
home.verifiedStudentsDesc: All students are verified by the platform administration after reviewing the university ID
home.comprehensiveRatingDesc: Rate your experience after each treatment and choose the best student for you based on ratings
home.locationBasedSearchDesc: Find cases near you using the geolocation system
home.directMessagingDesc: Communicate directly with the student after accepting your request to coordinate appointments
home.appointmentRemindersDesc: Get automatic reminders before appointments so you don't forget
home.freeTreatmentDesc: Get free or low-cost treatment from dental students
home.howItWorksSubtitle: Simple steps to get started with your dental journey
home.faqSubtitle: Find answers to frequently asked questions
home.faq1Answer: Yes, treatment is free because it is provided by dental students under the supervision of specialized doctors.
home.faq2Answer: Yes, all students are verified and study at recognized dental colleges.
home.faq3: How many cases can I apply for?
home.faq3Answer: You can apply for up to 5 cases at the same time.
home.ctaDescription: Join over 2000 patients and 500 students benefiting from the Smiley platform today

videoSection.title: Learn How to Use the Platform

home.footerDescription: A platform that connects dental students with patients
home.copyright: © 2026 Smiley Dental Clinic. All rights reserved.
